testcase.name: Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Styling - Default Button Appearance › should have correct default appearance when enabled
Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Styling - Hover State Visual Feedback › should provide proper visual feedback on hover

failure.message: delete-button-ui.spec.ts:41:9 should provide proper visual feedback on hover

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › delete-button-ui.spec.ts:41:9 › Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Styling - Hover State Visual Feedback › should provide proper visual feedback on hover
Error: expect(received).toContain(expected) // indexOf
Expected substring: "ease" Received string: "0.3s"
65 | // And the transition should be smooth (contains 'ease') 66 | const transition = await bookSearchPage.getDeleteButtonComputedStyle('transition'); > 67 | expect(transition).toContain('ease'); | ^ 68 | 69 | // When I move my mouse away from the button 70 | await bookSearchPage.searchInput.hover(); at /Users/konstantinosloupos/Projects/Meetup/book-search-app/playwright/tests/delete-button-ui.spec.ts:67:26
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-result/delete-button-ui-Delete-Bu-72283-er-visual-feedback-on-hover-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Styling - Disabled State Visual Indicators › should have correct visual indicators when disabled
Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Interactions - Click Feedback and Active State › should provide appropriate click feedback with active state styling
Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Interactions - Focus Indicators for Keyboard Users › should show proper focus indicators for keyboard navigation
Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Layout - Button Positioning Within Search Container › should be properly positioned within the search container
Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Layout - Responsive Behavior for Mobile › should adapt correctly to mobile responsive layout
Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Accessibility - Color Contrast Requirements › should meet accessibility color contrast requirements
Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Accessibility - Size Requirements › should meet minimum size requirements for accessibility
Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Animations - Transition Smoothness and Motion Preferences › should have smooth animations that are not disorienting

failure.message: delete-button-ui.spec.ts:247:9 should have smooth animations that are not disorienting

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › delete-button-ui.spec.ts:247:9 › Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Animations - Transition Smoothness and Motion Preferences › should have smooth animations that are not disorienting
Error: expect(received).toContain(expected) // indexOf
Expected substring: "ease" Received string: "0.3s"
255 | // Then all transitions should use "ease" timing function 256 | const transition = await bookSearchPage.getDeleteButtonComputedStyle('transition'); > 257 | expect(transition).toContain('ease'); | ^ 258 | 259 | // And transition should be defined 260 | expect(transition).not.toBe('all 0s ease 0s'); at /Users/konstantinosloupos/Projects/Meetup/book-search-app/playwright/tests/delete-button-ui.spec.ts:257:26

testcase.name: Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI States - Button State Consistency › should be visually consistent with search button
Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Feedback - Loading State Behavior › should provide immediate visual feedback during loading states
Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Errors - Error State Visual Handling › should maintain normal appearance during error states
Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Customization - Theme Compatibility › should work seamlessly with application theme
Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Usability - Visual Hierarchy › should have appropriate visual hierarchy in the interface
Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Interactions - Button Feedback Timing › should provide feedback at appropriate timing
Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › High Contrast Mode and Forced Colors › should remain visible and functional in high contrast mode
Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Styling - Default Button Appearance › should have correct default appearance when enabled
Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Styling - Hover State Visual Feedback › should provide proper visual feedback on hover

testcase.failure:
[firefox] › delete-button-ui.spec.ts:126:9 › Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Interactions - Focus Indicators for Keyboard Users › should show proper focus indicators for keyboard navigation
Error: expect(locator).not.toBeFocused() failed
Locator: locator('.delete-button') Expected: not focused Received: focused Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "not toBeFocused" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('.delete-button') 9 × locator resolved to <button type="button" class="delete-button" aria-label="Delete search" _ngcontent-ng-c3324351578=""> Delete </button> - unexpected value "focused"

Expected: > 355 Received: 38

Error: expect(received).toBeGreaterThan(expected)
Expected: > 352 Received: 38
153 | if (deleteButtonBox && searchButtonBox) { 154 | // Then the delete button should be positioned to the right of the search button > 155 | expect(deleteButtonBox.x).toBeGreaterThan(searchButtonBox.x + searchButtonBox.width); | ^ 156 | 157 | // And there should be consistent gap between search and delete buttons (10px from CSS) 158 | const gap = deleteButtonBox.x - (searchButtonBox.x + searchButtonBox.width); at /Users/konstantinosloupos/Projects/Meetup/book-search-app/playwright/tests/delete-button-ui.spec.ts:155:35

testcase.name: Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Layout - Responsive Behavior for Mobile › should adapt correctly to mobile responsive layout
Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Accessibility - Color Contrast Requirements › should meet accessibility color contrast requirements
Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Accessibility - Size Requirements › should meet minimum size requirements for accessibility
Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Animations - Transition Smoothness and Motion Preferences › should have smooth animations that are not disorienting

failure.message: delete-button-ui.spec.ts:247:9 should have smooth animations that are not disorienting

testcase.failure:
[Mobile Safari] › delete-button-ui.spec.ts:247:9 › Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Animations - Transition Smoothness and Motion Preferences › should have smooth animations that are not disorienting
Error: expect(received).toContain(expected) // indexOf
Expected substring: "ease" Received string: "0.3s"
255 | // Then all transitions should use "ease" timing function 256 | const transition = await bookSearchPage.getDeleteButtonComputedStyle('transition'); > 257 | expect(transition).toContain('ease'); | ^ 258 | 259 | // And transition should be defined 260 | expect(transition).not.toBe('all 0s ease 0s'); at /Users/konstantinosloupos/Projects/Meetup/book-search-app/playwright/tests/delete-button-ui.spec.ts:257:26

testcase.name: Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI States - Button State Consistency › should be visually consistent with search button

failure.message: delete-button-ui.spec.ts:275:9 should be visually consistent with search button

testcase.failure:
[Mobile Safari] › delete-button-ui.spec.ts:275:9 › Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI States - Button State Consistency › should be visually consistent with search button

Expected: < 3 Received: 4

testcase.name: Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Feedback - Loading State Behavior › should provide immediate visual feedback during loading states
Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Errors - Error State Visual Handling › should maintain normal appearance during error states
Delete Button UI Interactions and Styling › UI Customization - Theme Compatibility › should work seamlessly with application theme

failure.message: delete-button-ui.spec.ts:374:9 should have appropriate visual hierarchy in the interface
